The '''Hrosma tiger''' was a large feline predator with a horn on its forehead. It was native to [[Baskarn]]. It was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and thus a very dangerous and ferocious hunter. Hrosma tigers had long life-spans but were rare in numbers as they often fought and killed each other in competition for territory and prey.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Way of the Yrashu}} {{1stm}}
